QueueLog.title: Queue Log
QueueLog.description: A record of queue data extracted from a screenshot.

city.description: City of the store (Beijing, Xi'an, Shanghai)

tableType.description: Type of table (e.g., Small, Medium, Large)

uploadTime.description: Actual time the file was uploaded

collectionDate.description: The date for grouping (usually Monday or Saturday)

queueLogs.description: Collection storing all queue monitoring data points.
